task_completion.description: Create the Colosseum image tiddler with required tag, type, and custom fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Colosseum' is visible. In edit mode, it should have the tag 'Landmark', content type 'image/jpeg', and custom fields '_canonical_uri' (matching the provided URL), 'location' (Rome, Italy), and 'year' (80 AD). In view mode, the image should render and fields may be visible.

task_completion.description: Create the Taj Mahal image tiddler with required tag, type, and custom fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Taj Mahal' is visible. In edit mode, it should have the tag 'Landmark', content type 'image/jpeg', and custom fields '_canonical_uri' (matching the provided URL), 'location' (Agra, India), and 'year' (1643).

task_completion.description: Create the Machu Picchu image tiddler with required tag, type, and custom fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Machu Picchu' is visible. In edit mode, it should have the tag 'Landmark', content type 'image/jpeg', and custom fields '_canonical_uri' (matching the provided URL), 'location' (Cusco Region, Peru), and 'year' (1450).

task_completion.description: Create the 'World Heritage Gallery' tiddler with an introductory description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'World Heritage Gallery' is visible and contains introductory text describing the gallery.

task_completion.description: The gallery tiddler displays the images by referencing the created tiddlers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'World Heritage Gallery' tiddler visually renders the three images (Colosseum, Taj Mahal, Machu Picchu). In edit mode, this should be achieved via transclusion (e.g., `{{Colosseum}}`) or a list widget (e.g., `<$list filter="[tag[Landmark]]">`), rather than direct image URLs.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki GUI in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki interface in a browser window, with evidence of clicking buttons, filling forms, or saving tiddlers.

integrity.description: The gallery tiddler does not contain direct image URLs or base64 data.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the edit mode of 'World Heritage Gallery', there are no direct URLs to the Wikimedia images or base64 encoded image strings; it only references the other tiddlers.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the individual image tiddlers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sidebar or story river shows distinct tiddlers for 'Colosseum', 'Taj Mahal', and 'Machu Picchu', not just a single text document.
